---
pagetitle: "People | Conservation Data Lab"
toc: TRUE
listing:
  - id: leads
    contents: "people/leads/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 225px
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby
  - id: co_leads
    contents: "people/co_leads/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 225px
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby
  - id: mentors
    contents: "people/mentors/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 225px
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby

  - id: members
    contents: "people/members/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    image-height: 225px
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: sortby
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    page-size: 1000

---


## Leads

:::{#leads}
:::

## Co-Leads

:::{#co_leads}
:::

## Mentors

:::{#mentors}
:::

## Members

:::{#members}
:::

## Alumni

::: {.columns}
:::: {.column width="50%"}
- Celeste Basken
- Cassie Begert
- Abril Belgara Andrew
- Scott Benhart
- Cole Bonino
- Brandon Caltrider
- Stacy Cotey
- Cassidy Downing
- Chris Eckerson
- Carson Freitag
- Eleanor Gagnon
- Mathurin Gagnon
- Andy Harrison
- Robyn Holmes
- Braden Kelsey
- Lea Kemle
- Eva Legge
- Rhayna Lillie
- Emma Lusting


::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}


- Erin Matula
- Kian McDonough
- Alex Mezera
- Avery Merrit
- Izzy Nykamp
- Julia Olsen
- Silas Pickhardt
- Laura Roncal
- Laura Slavsky
- Hayley Smith
- Cassie Stitzman
- Alice Stoff
- Maddie Tango
- Beth Teeters
- Erick Joel Pimienta Tovar
- Sarah Trujillo
- Myles Walimaa
- Gavin White
- Anna Wright
- Myles Walimaa
::::
:::
